Selection criteria

Readable UI, fair rule transparency, responsive support, stable mobile performance, and sane bet limits beat flashy rockets.

Why Astronaut stays visible

Strong rocket metaphor, brisk rounds, integration with a major lobby — demand driver, not profit promise.

Frequently asked questions

Should I rotate ten crash games nightly?
